title: Walk-in Drive Store Manager at Star Bazaar Global Group

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Store Manager at Star Bazaar Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Star Bazaar Global Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Store Manager at our Nashik location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Star Bazaar Global Group:
Star Bazaar Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Star Bazaar Global Group!
